## The Journey

### Arc Title (sessions: ejs-session-YYYY-MM-DD-NN, ...)

#### What was happening

Source: Problem/Intent sections of the grouped sessions.

#### How it unfolded
The narrative — key interactions, experiments, pivots.
Weave in perspectives:
- Human perspective: what the human prioritized, where they overrode agents
- Human + Agent: the back-and-forth, adopted suggestions
- Agent: independent contributions, analysis, research
- Agent-to-Agent: sub-agent delegations, handoff chains, conflicts

#### What was decided
Decisions with rationale. Link to ADR if one was created.

#### What was learned
Key insights that carried forward to future arcs.
